title: Stock Radar: Trent broke out from an inverted head & shoulder pattern; time to buy?
summary: Trent Ltd stock has broken out of a bullish reversal pattern. Experts recommend buying the stock for a target of Rs 3,500 in the next one to two months. The stock has shown strong momentum after testing key moving averages. Traders can accumulate the stock within a specific range with a stop loss.

title: HDFC Bank extends Keki Mistry's interim chairman tenure by three months
summary: HDFC Bank announced a three-month extension for Keki Mistry as interim part-time chairman. The Reserve Bank of India approved this extension until September 18, 2026. This decision comes after the previous chairman's resignation. Mistry continues in his role, ensuring continuity at the bank.

title: SBI’s board clears record Rs 60,000 cr fundraise in FY27
summary: State Bank of India's central board has approved raising up to Rs 60,000 crore this fiscal through rupee and dollar bonds. This move aims to bolster the bank's capital position and support business growth. Funds will be raised via various debt instruments from Indian and overseas investors.

title: Ahead of  ₹30,000-crore IPO, NSE's FY26 earnings serve up a reality check
summary: A steep 16% drop in net profit and shrinking margins show how Sebi's derivatives crackdown and legacy legal settlements are taking a toll on the exchange's core business.
